name: Cashew Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the first four ingredients in a blender or grind them through a food grinder, leaving out the soy milk.
2. If grinding, pour the soy milk over the mixture.
3. Add the soy sauce, salt, dried parsley, and celery seed to the mixture and mix well.
4. Grease a baking pan and pour the mixture into it.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until firm, approximately 40 minutes.
6. Approximately 325 calories per serving.
